channel.title: SoloSuccess Solutions Blog
channel.description: Building in public: Updates and insights from SoloSuccess Solutions.

item.title: Building in public: why I share everything
item.description: Transparency is a strategy, not just a personality trait. Here's why I share the full picture — wins, losses, and everything in between.

item.title: SoloDesign ships — no designer required
item.description: My fourth live product just launched. Describe what you need — SoloDesign delivers polished visual assets in minutes.

item.title: SoloScribe is live — write like you have a team
item.description: SoloScribe officially launched today. Voice matching, long-form AI, and persistent context — all built for solo founders who write alone.

item.title: The mistake that cost me 3 weeks
item.description: I over-engineered the database layer for SoloScribe before I had a single user. Here's what I'd do differently.

item.title: Content Factory: from idea to launch in 6 weeks
item.description: I built Content Factory faster than any other product. Here's the full breakdown of how and why.

item.title: Academy v1 shipped — here's what I learned
item.description: SoloSuccess Academy is live. Here's everything I built, everything I cut, and what's coming in v2.

item.title: Why I started SoloSuccess Solutions
item.description: I spent weeks searching for software built for solo founders. It didn't exist. So I stopped searching and started building.
